title: Monitoring & drift
focus: Separate infra / data / model monitoring; alerts that map to actions.

items.label: Design a monitoring stack for a fraud model with delayed labels

interviewQuestions: Separate infra monitoring, data monitoring, and model monitoring — what's in each?
